title: Length of Longest Fibonacci Subsequence
titleCn: 最长的斐波那契子序列的长度

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8] Output: 5 Explanation: The longest subsequence that is fibonacci-like: [1,2,3,5,8].
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The longest subsequence that is fibonacci-like: [1,2,3,5,8].

testcases.input: arr = [1,3,7,11,12,14,18] Output: 3 Explanation: The longest subsequence that is fibonacci-like: [1,11,12], [3,11,14] or [7,11,18].
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The longest subsequence that is fibonacci-like: [1,11,12], [3,11,14] or [7,11,18].
